description_long: This is a modern-style couch with a wooden frame and slatted wooden armrests and back. The seating area features a set of plush, loose cushions with a watercolor-like pastel upholstery in shades of green, purple, blue, and pink. The couch is accompanied by a matching ottoman, which shares the same cushion design and upholstery pattern. The wooden frame is dark brown and contrasts with the light, colorful fabric of the cushions. The couch sits on short, blocky wooden legs that are visible beneath the frame. The overall design is contemporary, with a focus on comfort and visual appeal, making it suitable for urban parks, patios, or stylish public spaces.
description: A modern wooden-framed couch with pastel watercolor-patterned cushions and a matching ottoman, featuring slatted armrests and a plush, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full couch, colorful cushions, and matching ottoman on a dark platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slatted wooden armrest and the alignment of the ottoman with the couch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous slatted wooden back and the overall length of the couch.
description_view_3: Angled view from above, showing the arrangement of cushions and the spatial relationship between the couch and ottoman.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose seat cushions and two loose back cushions on the main couch, with one accent pillow and a separate ottoman cushion; all cushions are plush and unattached.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Watercolor-style pastel pattern in green, purple, blue, and pink on a white background; fabric is smooth and non-tufted.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky, exposed wooden legs, dark brown in color, supporting both the couch and ottoman.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, horizontal slatted wooden armrests, medium height, matching the dark brown frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with loose, plush cushions resting against a slatted wooden frame.
